calendar.matters:
In Re The Douglass Holloway And Ava Soifer 2005 Revocable Inter-Vivos Trust
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Rauch for and with Ava Soifer.

The court stated that there is a request for the court to appoint Ms. Soifer as owner & trustee of the 401(k) plan with Fidelity and asked if there was any reason a successor trustee had not been appointed. Ms. Rauch stated that Mr. Holloway simply did not appoint a successor trustee during his lifetime and that Fidelity has locked the account and will not release it without a court order. Ms. Soifer explained that notes left by her husband indicated that he did not understand that anything further needed to be done, that he was an estate planning attorney but that there was no clarity as to ensuring the 401(k) would go to her. The court stated that the vacancy in the role of trustee needs to be filled and that someone needs to be able to act on behalf of this trust. The petition to confirm trust ownership of certain assets, etc. was granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Zambrana. (Not Reported)
